texto: I am a fireball of emotions and impulses
autor: my zest for life is unquenchable. And I am either of only two things: Fire or Ice.
explicacao: Citação de my zest for life is unquenchable. And I am either of only two things: Fire or Ice. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I am a fireball of emotions and impulses” articula reflexao, trish-kaye-lleone, fireball em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
